creator: andrew@grillet.co.uk
text:
I was able to install KDE after attempting to build the ports (XFree86 and KDE).
After attempting to build, I was able to get the package to install. 

uname -a says: 
FreeBSD catnip.grillet.home 4.4-RELEASE FreeBSD 4.4-RELEASE #0: Tue Sep 18 11:57:08 PDT 2001     
murray@builder.FreeBSD.org:/usr/src/sys/compile/GENERIC  i386

(.home is behind the firewall)

Bonobo is broken.  It cannot build. 

regards

Andrew
